articles.title: For $6.5m, this Connecticut inn comes with a liquor license in trendy Mystic
articles.description:
For the past 10 years, it has operated as a boutique luxury hotel called the Captain’s Mansion.

The post For $6.5m, this Connecticut inn comes with a liquor license in trendy Mystic appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connecticut's Captain's Mansion inn listed for $6.5 million, attracting Boston investors.
The inn has operated as a luxury hotel for 10 years, enhancing regional tourism.
Acquisition includes a liquor license, potentially boosting local nightlife and economy.
